trigon_fight.title: Use your tamed Baby Trigon in combat — defeat 10 End entities with your companion active

trigon_fly.title: Mount and fly your Baby Trigon across an outer End island — confirm flight ability is active

subtitle.text: A tamed dragon is not a pet. It is a flying weapons platform. Use it as one.

description: CH.14 · TRIGON AS WEAPON
▸ The grown Baby Trigon is a combat companion.
It is not passive. It fights.
Three heads, three attack patterns, aerial mobility.
In the End dimension, it is at full effectiveness.
In Ch15-17, it becomes your cavalry.
Deploy it correctly.
◈ COMBAT APPLICATIONS
└ Aggressive companion: attacks mobs that target the player
(useful in End City sweeps — Shulkers, Endermen, Cataclysm mobs)
└ Void survival: Trigon does not take void damage
(can pursue enemies across void gaps safely)
└ Three-head attack set — approximate capabilities:
Head 1: direct bite/melee (close combat)
Head 2: ranged ender attack (projectile)
Head 3: breath/AOE variant (area denial)
└ Synergy with ISS Eldritch: you cast void spells,
Trigon handles melee — split attention coverage
◈ FLIGHT MECHANICS
└ Mount: right-click adult/large Trigon to ride
└ Flight controls: same as horse mounting (WASD-based)
└ Aerial advantage: dragons fly faster than Elytra under power
for short distances; Elytra better for long-range travel
└ Combat on dragonback: ranged weapons work while mounted
(Bow, Crossbow, ISS ranged spells)
└ Best use case: boss openers — fly in fast, make first strike
then dismount if flight becomes liability
◈ CH15-17 DEPLOYMENT
└ Ch15 (After the Dragon): Overworld bosses — Trigon still effective
outdoors, less useful in underground dungeons
└ Ch16 (Long Road Home): Celestisynth zones, outdoor farming
Trigon provides air superiority during build sessions
└ Ch17 (Lords of All): Pre-quantum endgame —
Trigon is pre-ascension companion (before Create Teleporter finale)
▸ The civilizations who reached the End first
did not fly on dragons.
They flew on Elytra and fireworks.
The dragon was always there, but untameable.
The Trigon is the first dragon in this dimension that chose.
That changes the equation.
You have air superiority now.
Use it.
▶ Fight alongside your Trigon against 10 End entities [check]
▶ Mount and fly your Trigon across an outer island [check]
◇ Baby Trigon food requirements for the grown phase:
End materials — Ender Pearl, Dragon Breath, Enderman Meat.
All sourced from your Ch13-14 farms.
Keep the Trigon well-fed and it stays loyal.
Hunger mechanics (if present in the mod): same rules as horses.
